# Nebraska Data Privacy Act

Jurisdiction: United States - Nebraska
Region: US-NE
Citation: Nebraska Data Privacy Act
Authority: Nebraska Legislature
Source URL: https://nebraskalegislature.gov/bills/view_bill.php?DocumentID=55050
Topics: notice_transparency, consent, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, marketing_opt_out, accountability
Keywords: Nebraska Data Privacy Act, consumer privacy

## Summary
Nebraska privacy law establishing consumer rights, opt-outs, privacy notices, and controller/processor obligations.

## Key compliance obligations
- Provide rights and opt-out mechanisms.
- Disclose data categories and purposes.
- Use processor contracts and privacy safeguards.
